selected_candidate: Make exact-next-action-only continuation a distinct Atlas continuation-contract reason and bind it into tests and production readiness.
alternatives_rejected: Only add another prompt sentence; rejected because the machine-readable readback still needed a distinct reason.
Treat short completed waves as ready-node denials; rejected because ready_nodes is zero in this failure mode.
Change final_response_allowed semantics broadly; rejected because final closure remains valid when all nodes complete and the lease minimum is met.
decision: Extend continuation contract reason derivation and validation, then assert the short completed wave keeps final response denied while exact_next_action remains.
